zh.lifeSummary: Richard Holt是John De Newton的兒子，於1197年出生在英國英格蘭爾牛頓。他和Baroness de Hussen至少有1個兒子。他去世於1239年在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Holt是John De Newton的儿子，于1197年出生在英国英格兰爾牛頓。他和Baroness de Hussen至少有1个儿子。他去世于1239年在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Holt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, North German, Dutch, Danish, and Norwegian: topographic name for someone who lived in or by a small wood, from Middle English, Middle Low German, Danish, and Norwegian holt, or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word. In England, the surname is widely distributed, but more common in Lancashire and Yorkshire than elsewhere.

variants.name: Hohlt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Ordell.
North German: variant of Holt with the additional h reflecting the lengthened vowel or a variant of Hohl with the addition of excrescent -t.
Scandinavian: variant of   Holt  .

variants.name: Holten
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Hjalmer, Lars, Nils.

Dutch (also Van Holten) and North German: habitational name from any of the places so called, from Low German holt ‘holt, copse, small wood’. There are two in the Dutch province of Overijssel and another near Oberhausen in the Rhineland.
Danish: variant of   Holt  .

variants.name: Holtan
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads so named, from the definite plural form of holt ‘small wood’ (see Holt ).

variants.name: Holter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Selmer, Hilmar, Knute, Lars.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of several farmsteads in southeastern Norway, from the indefinite plural of holt ‘holt, small wood’ (see Holt ).
North German (also Hölter): habitational name for someone from any of several places in Westphalia called Hölt and Holt (see Holt ). Compare Hoelter .

variants.name: Holtman
meanings: Dutch: variant of Holt + man ‘man’.
Americanized form of German   Holtmann  .

variants.name: Holtmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Udo, Aloys, Hans, Heinz.
North German: variant of   Holt  .

variants.name: Holte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorg, Erik, Helmer, Hjalmer, Knute, Nels, Nordahl, Selmer, Swen, Thorvald.
North German: variant of   Holt  .
North German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Hoult
meanings: English: variant of   Holt  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Holt was born in 1197, in Newton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of John De Newton. He had at least 1 son with Baroness de Hussen. He died in 1239, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Holt est né en 1197, à Newton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John De Newton. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Baroness de Hussen. Il est décédé en 1239, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Holt wurde 1197 in Newton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von John De Newton geboren. Er hatte mit Baroness de Hussen mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1239 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Holt è nato il nel 1197 nel Newton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di John De Newton. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Baroness de Hussen. Morì nel 1239, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.Newton Cheshire England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアニュートン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Holtは1197年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアニュートンでJohn De Newtonの息子として生まれた。彼はBaroness de Hussenとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1239年に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Holt(은)는 1197년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 뉴턴에서 John De Newton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Baroness de Hussen(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1239년 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Holt nasceu em 1197, em Newton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de John De Newton. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Baroness de Hussen. Ele faleceu em 1239, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Holt родился в 1197 г. в местности нютон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали John De Newton. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Baroness de Hussen. Он умер в 1239 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Holt nació en 1197, en Newton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de John De Newton. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Baroness de Hussen. Murió en 1239, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
